name: kanban-board
title: Kanban Board
author: Parable
description: A drag-and-drop task board (no DnD deps): pointer-drag cards to reorder within a column or move across columns, with a pointer-tracking overlay, a dashed placeholder gap, Motion layout springs, and a cubic-bezier drop settle. Full Ctrl/Cmd+arrow keyboard moves announced via a live region. Under prefers-reduced-motion there is no lift easing, gliding gap or settle — moves land instantly on a legible static list.
